executive_summary: Recent Federal Reserve communications suggest a more gradual approach to recalibrating monetary policy, amid stronger-than-expected economic data and somewhat higher-than-expected inflation readings.

investor_takeaways.thesis: Gradual monetary policy recalibration amid moderate growth and somewhat higher inflation.
